global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a slender, streamlined body and long, pointed wings. It features a predominantly white body with a contrasting black cap on the head and a forked tail. The wings have a light gray upper surface and a white underside.

part_details.head: Smooth black cap covering the top and back, contrasting with white face.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed with light gray upper surface and white underside.
part_details.tail: Deeply forked, white with grayish tips.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with a slight grayish tint on the back.
part_details.beak: Short, slender, and sharp, typically orange with a black tip.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, extending to the nape.
The wings extend laterally from the slender body.
The forked tail is positioned at the rear, aiding in flight maneuverability.
